name: Gloves Off
overview: Get ready for an adrenaline-fueled journey into the heart of boxing with "PBC Gloves Off" on Amazon Prime! Step into the ring with some of the world's most skilled fighters as they share their personal stories, training regimes, and the intense dedication required to reach the top. Witness the raw emotion and exhilarating moments as these athletes lay it all on the line, showcasing their determination and resilience with every punch thrown. From underdog tales to championship triumphs, this gripping series offers an intimate look at the highs and lows of the boxing world, captivating audiences with its powerful storytelling and electrifying action. Don't miss out on the ultimate ringside experience – stream "PBC Gloves Off" now, exclusively on Amazon Prime!

trailers.title: GLOVES OFF: THURMAN vs. TSZYU & ROLLY vs. PITBULL | TEASER | Tim Tszyu
